login.title: Sign in to Fundout
login.description: Enter your email to receive a secure sign-in link.
login.checkInboxDescription: We sent a sign-in link to {{email}}. Click it to continue.
login.checkInboxHint: Open the email and click the link to continue. You can close this tab — the link will bring you back.
